## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to
      change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes. -->

- [ ] I ran `ruff check src/ tests/` and it passes.
- [ ] I ran `pytest tests/ --cov` and all tests pass.
- [ ] I added new tests for any new functionality.
- [ ] I updated the documentation / README if applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guide (ruff, line-length=100).
- [ ] I have added or updated docstrings for any new public API.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally.
- [ ] My commits are signed (`git commit -S` or configured to sign by default).
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` if applicable.
